title: senecio hoehnei
intro: Senecio hoehnei, also known as Hoehne's ragwort, is a plant species within the Senecio genus, native to South America, particularly in Brazil and Argentina. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Senecio hoehnei include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Senecio hoehnei is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
